title: A Tennis Champion's Urban Adventure
article_text: My friend was a tennis winner, and he used to travel abroad for matches. He said that the accommodation was always a highlight of his trips. The southern city had a warm climate, but the urban noise was an exception to the peace. One day, a reporter asked him to breathe deeply before a big match. He wore a brown shirt, and his soul felt calm. He was confusing the reporter with a question about corporate sponsors. He talked about a large corporation that made computer chips. The beauty of the game was partly in the mental challenge. He had been encountering new fans, and he was capable of defeating any opponent. His coach told him that the output of his practice was improving.
